title: dialium modestum
intro: Dialium modestum is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the 'Kokum' or 'Wild Mangosteen'. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dialium modestum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health ailments.
